title: Table-valued function syntax allowed for ordinary tables and views
poc: WITH x AS (SELECT * FROM t) SELECT * FROM x(0);
key_bug_features: Table-valued function syntax on ordinary tables and views
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, age INTEGER CHECK(age >= 0));
WITH temp AS (SELECT id FROM users WHERE age IS NULL) SELECT * FROM temp(0);
CREATE TABLE orders(order_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, user_id INTEGER, amount REAL DEFAULT 0.0);
